rules.statement: All .intent/ artifact files (*.yaml, *.json) MUST contain only printable ASCII characters (0x20-0x7E) plus standard whitespace (0x09, 0x0A, 0x0D). Unicode characters are forbidden.
rules.rationale: Intent artifacts are loaded into a PostgreSQL SQL_ASCII encoded database via worker_registry and blackboard_entries. Non-ASCII characters in YAML title or responsibility fields cause UntranslatableCharacterError at runtime, silently crashing governance workers. The constraint is also defensive against copy-paste from editors or LLMs that substitute typographic characters (em dashes, curly quotes, ellipses) for their ASCII equivalents.
